calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Citibank, N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Latosha A. Hubbard.
Copy of the filed declaration in lieu of live testimony by Dorothy Ruiz was presented in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal $2,516.15
Costs $330.00, for a Total of $2,846.15
Judgment was submitted and signed.

Ntc Of Motion For Order Deeming Pltfs Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS IS Denied without prejudice. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-tem, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
